top_signals.title: EU set to remove barriers to banks’ cross-border capital flows
top_signals.summary: Draft report by European Commission aims to boost performance of lenders in bloc compared with US rivals
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Trump’s fears about economy undercut U.S. leverage in Iran talks
top_signals.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump cited the prospect of global economic collapse as a big reason he signed an interim peace deal. That could cost him in talks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
